meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no coding experience (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no coding experience. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup for Non-Coders
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills setup to bridge the no-code gap. A founder-focused tutorial on building MVPs using Antigravity and AI-driven development workflows.
content.answer_block: Claude Code transforms your natural language into production-ready software by acting as an autonomous engineering partner. By pairing it with Antigravity, you eliminate the technical barrier to entry. Simply configure your CLI environment, define your business logic via prompts, and let the AI architect, write, and deploy your MVP.
content.intro:
The barrier between a million-dollar vision and a live product has never been thinner, yet most founders remain paralyzed by the 'no-coding experience' myth. You don't need a CS degree to ship; you need a bridge between your business logic and the machine. 

Claude Code is that bridge. It turns your intent into execution, allowing you to bypass syntax errors and focus entirely on product-market fit. By integrating Antigravity, you gain the structural scaffolding required to turn abstract ideas into scalable, revenue-generating SaaS applications in record time.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a secure, isolated workspace for your project to ensure your codebase remains clean and modular.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project structure for a SaaS MVP. Include a README, a src directory, and a basic configuration file for a TypeScript-based project.

steps.title: Defining Business Logic
steps.description: Translate your unique value proposition into a functional technical requirement document that the AI can interpret.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Write a technical specification for a user authentication system that uses email/password and integrates with Stripe for subscription management.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Generate a technical spec for user auth and Stripe integration"

steps.title: AI-Driven Component Generation
steps.description: Generate the core UI components and API routes required for your MVP functionality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a landing page component with a hero section and a pricing table that looks professional and converts well.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add "Create a landing page with hero and pricing components"

steps.title: Database Schema Modeling
steps.description: Design your data layer to be scalable, ensuring your application can handle growth without requiring a total rewrite.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a database schema for a SaaS user table, subscription status, and activity logs using Prisma.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Create Prisma schema for User and Subscription models"

steps.title: Deployment and Validation
steps.description: Push your code to a live environment to begin gathering user feedback immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the deployment pipeline for Vercel and run a final audit on code quality and security headers.

pro_tips: Treat the AI as a junior developer: provide explicit context on your business goals rather than just asking for code.
Use Antigravity to generate 'test-first' requirements to ensure the AI doesn't hallucinate features you don't need.
Regularly commit your code after every successful feature implementation to allow for easy rollbacks.
Focus on shipping 'ugly' features first; use the AI to iterate on UI/UX only after the backend logic is validated.
Audit the generated code using Claude's 'explain' feature to understand what you are shipping, ensuring you can maintain it later.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, start the 'Feedback Loop' phase: invite 10 potential users, monitor their behavior, and use Claude Code to iterate on the features they actually use.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped to build faster than 99% of your competition. Stop waiting for a technical co-founder and start engineering your future today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
